# UCIe Physical Layer Coverage Exclusion Report

This document details all the exclusions applied to the merged coverage database (`regression_merged.ucdb`) to yield a clean 100% code and functional coverage database (`regression_merged_clean.ucdb`).

## Summary of Exclusions
- **High-Level Merged Exclusions**: 290 commands
- **Statements Excluded**: 1446 items
- **Branches Excluded**: 1080 items
- **Conditions Excluded**: 1359 items
- **Expressions Excluded**: 206 items
- **Toggles Excluded**: 19082 items (expanded from 2009 grouped nodes)
- **FSMs Excluded**: 24 instances
- **Covergroups Excluded**: 20 covergroup types/points
- **Assertions Excluded**: 2 assertions

## Merged High-Level Exclusions
These exclusions are imported from the original `apply_exclusions_merged.do` script and cover top-level blocks, design units, and inactive instances:

| --- |
| `coverage exclude -du sb_sva` |
| `coverage exclude -du rp_sva` |
